title: CEL Consultant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
shortInfo: Central Electronics (CEL) Consultant (D&AR) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website celindia.co.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the CEL Consultant (D&AR) Recruitment 2026.

basic_details.short_information: Central Electronics (CEL) Consultant (D&AR) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website celindia.co.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the CEL Consultant (D&AR) Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate, preferably with a degree in Law/ Personnel Management/Industrial Relations
qualification.details: Graduate, preferably with a degree in Law/ Personnel Management/Industrial Relations

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for CEL Consultant (D&AR) Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 03-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the CEL Consultant (D&AR) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the CEL Consultant (D&AR) recruitment is 03-06-2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the post name for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for this recruitment is Consultant (D&AR).

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available?
faq.answer: There is 1 vacancy available for the Consultant (D&AR) post.

faq.question: Q4. What is the mode of application?
faq.answer: The mode of application is Offline.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Consultant (D&AR) post?
faq.answer: The salary offered is Rs. 50000 Per Month, which is negotiable.

faq.question: Q6. What is the maximum age limit for this position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for this position is 63 years.

faq.question: Q7. What are the educational qualifications required?
faq.answer: Candidates should be Graduate, preferably with a degree in Law/ Personnel Management/Industrial Relations.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the job location?
faq.answer: The job location is Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type?
faq.answer: The job type is Contract.
